mechanics.statement: After 10 minutes, Soul Urn spawns in one of six possible locations.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Neutral Urn location is next to the bridge in either Yellow or Green lane.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Favored Urn location is next to a jungle camp near either the favored team's Yellow or Green Walker.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Unfavored Urn location is next to a jungle camp near either the enemy team's Yellow or Green Walker.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: The Urn respawns and alternates lanes every five minutes.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: If picked up before a scheduled spawn time and delivered after it, it does not spawn again until the next scheduled spawn time.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: The Urn descends from the sky for 12 seconds before becoming available.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: A landed Urn is picked up using a melee attack.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Rejuvenator appears as a green crystal with green aura and contains the golden angel symbol.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Rejuvenator descends where Mid Boss was and becomes claimable after reaching the ground.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: Rejuvenator may be claimed three times using heavy melee; each claimed charge grants a team member a personal Rejuvenator buff.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: On death, a player consumes one personal buff; one player cannot consume more than the buff they possess.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.

mechanics.statement: CCitadel_ArmorUpgrade_PersonalRejuvenator may represent the personal post-claim buff.
limitations: Do not apply this rule to canonical replay events until build applicability is resolved.
Treat as hypothesis, not confirmed class mapping.
